title: TCG Additions
description: Addon mod for the TCG SMP that fixes various issues and adds some quality of life features
body:
# TCGAdditions

Adds various QOL features to the TCG Modpack.

## Features
- Insert Cards Button that automatically inserts all cards in your inventory into the collectors album if possible
- Renders dark background behind the category pages
- Scales cards and effects in pack opening screen and makes them gui-scale invariant 
- Fix dupe bug in collectors album
- Allow galena gauntlet to be used with tinker's tools that have the magnetic attribute
